title: CSP form-action seems to be ignored if target="_blank"
description_snippet:
Steps to reproduce the problem:
1. Go to https://scotthelme.co.uk/form-action-test-bug/
2. Click on any button

What is the expected behavior?
No form is submitted.

What went wrong?
CSP CSP form-action is bypassed when target is set to "_blank". See  https://crbug.com/chromium/630332 for mo
